findings.title: error_handling: 9 variants in arrow/
findings.description:
9 error_handling variants in arrow/ (2/10 use canonical pattern).
  - arrow.py:783 (Arrow.interval)
  - arrow.py:786 (Arrow.interval)
  - arrow.py:1831 (Arrow._get_tzinfo)
findings.fix: Konsolidiere auf das dominante Pattern (2×). 8 Abweichung(en) in: arrow.py, parser.py, util.py und 3 weitere.
findings.reviewer_note: 9 error handling variants across date library - real fragmentation

findings.title: Exact duplicates (2×): CroatianLocale._format_timeframe, SerbianLocale._format_timeframe
findings.description: 2 identical copies (10 lines each) at: arrow\locales.py:4969, arrow\locales.py:5560. Consider consolidating.
findings.fix: Extrahiere CroatianLocale._format_timeframe() in arrow/shared.py. 2 identische Kopien (Similarity: 1.00). Aufwand: S.

findings.title: Near-duplicate (100%): CzechLocale._format_timeframe ↔ SlovakLocale._format_timeframe
findings.description: arrow\locales.py:3296 and arrow\locales.py:3427 are 100% similar. Small differences may indicate copy-paste divergence.
findings.fix: Extrahiere CzechLocale._format_timeframe() in arrow/shared.py. Similarity: 100%. Aufwand: S.
